title: Add agent mode handling to interpreter route
completion_summary: Added agent mode branch to interpreter API route with AgentLoop integration. Extended InterpreterResponsePayload with agentPlan/agentSteps. Updated isSessionMode guard for agent and autonomous modes.
context_files: src/app/api/interpreter/route.ts (lines 108-242: existing POST handler; add sessionMode='agent' branch)
acceptance_criteria: Route recognizes sessionMode='agent' (via isSessionMode which now accepts 'agent')
When sessionMode='agent': creates AgentLoop, calls execute(input, mode)
Returns InterpreterResponsePayload extended with plan and step results
When sessionMode='assistant' or 'interpreter': existing behavior UNCHANGED
New agent-mode response includes translatedText (final output), plan (AgentPlan), completedSteps
Agent mode respects existing rate limiting, timeout, and error handling
Does NOT modify providerRouter, guardrails, or any DO-NOT-TOUCH files
